title: WW3-ML-Snl: machine-learning surrogate for the nonlinear four-wave interaction in WAVEWATCH III
description: WAVEWATCH III coupled with a machine-learning surrogate for the nonlinear four-wave interaction (S_nl), added as an NL6 source term evaluated at run time through ONNX Runtime. Includes three trained surrogates (ML and ML-Lite depth-scaled networks, and the depth-conditioned finite-depth ML-FiLM network), the ONNX Runtime wrappers, and the training notebooks.
